Yeah I’m debating it because I already have some keyflare wheels like Tawil’s.
how close you are to the maximum stats for the whole covenant set
thanx, both of u
covenants will have substats once you reach keeper level 45 , and minmaxing substats along with the main stat is quite an endeavor
Ah level 45
I not at what level
Ok and thanks
oh but make sure they can actually make use of the boosted stats like nymph though
e.g. someone like xu might not benefit as much

Completion gets higher when you upgrade covenant pieces or get better substat rolls
Realm mastery is teamwide and enchances realm effects 
Aliemus regen recovers aliemus after a character exalts, its generally a weaker stat with noticeable diminishing returns
Sigil yield increases the amount of sigils you get after a battle 
Dmg amplification is a teamwide stat, dmg formula in img below 
Keyflare regen affects how much keyflare a unit generates when spending arithmetica, but also interacts with many other keyflare effects
The game will eventually explain some of these<:Aurita_please:1356053110375714817>

## Compendium

anything that can do damage, and preferably someone that doesn't mind discards

aurita based (you get her for free when u progress a bit)
Sanga exalt spam based (might be a bit unnecessarily slow for early game tbh)
